note: Golden cases for refactor-defect accumulation detectors (docs/REFACTOR_DEFECT_ACCUMULATION.md). Each case is an ordered sequence of complete source snapshots; `01-before`/`02-after` directory order is the revision order. No runner consumes this manifest yet; it is the Phase 0 contract that Phase 1 detectors are coded against.
